title: Sqlitelogictest crash
poc: CREATE TABLE tab0(pk INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, col0 INTEGER, col1 FLOAT, col2 TEXT, col3 INTEGER, col4 FLOAT, col5 TEXT);
SELECT + 86 / - + 59 + + - col1 + - - 40 FROM tab0 WHERE NOT + col2 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Invalid SQL syntax in SELECT statement
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table(name, value) VALUES ('Test1', 10.5), ('Test2', NULL), ('Test3', 20.0);
SELECT id, name, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND value > 15.0;
UPDATE test_table SET value = value + 5 WHERE name LIKE 'Test%';
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE NOT (created_at IS NULL) AND value BETWEEN 10 AND 30;
